document.name: Fekete
document.shortDescription: Minimal black-and-white café on Wesselényi — specialty coffee and cakes in the Jewish Quarter fringe.
document.longDescription:
Fekete on Wesselényi utca is a design-forward coffee shop known for monochrome interiors and precise espresso. Pastries and filter coffee draw daytime visitors away from nearby nightlife. Hours on feketebudapest.com.

Sources: https://www.feketebudapest.com/
